title: Signatures Block
description: Signature block for one or more parties, laid out in a configurable number of columns

new_page.description: Start signatures on a new page

header.description: Optional section header text shown above the signatures (e.g. 'Underskrifter'). Omit for no header.

columns.description: Number of signature panes per row

show_location_date.description: Show the 'Ort och datum' line and dotted entry above each signature line

name.description: Party/company name (omit to suppress the bold header above the signature)

signatory.description: Name of person signing (defaults to name if omitted)

title.description: Signatory title, e.g. 'Verkställande Direktör, Acme AB'
